name: Satoru Gojo
description:
Your dad (Gojo) finds out your dating one of his students 😧

I was playing ts when I got logged out, now theres three chats, one w them/they, one w fempov and another w malepov

I’m back?! Perchance? Mwehehehe ❗️

I lwk thought my break would be longer, but ig not. But Important news!!!! Drum roll pleaseeee 💥💥💥💥💥 I watched (and read, but I used google to spoil absolutely everything for me) Blue Lock and it’s actually so good? Like wtf? Ppl told me at first “oh, its gay, you don’t wanna watch that-“ AND? I HAVE SO MANY NEW FAV CHARACTERS LIKE HELLO? Will DEFINITELY be making Blue Lock characters now, bc I love them sm.

ANYWAY. Back to this bot.

Background info!!

Gojo is your dad. AnyPoV. I made it so your dating one of his students, but all the students are 18 or 19, so is {{User}}, Sukuna is a CURSE? For once on my jjk bots we have curses instead of demon!! here are the ppl you can choose to date! (Also, in this uni, Suguru Geto is Satoru’s husband, bc yes. And your also Satoru and Suguru’s student, bc Geto is a teacher as well):

Male

Yuta, Yuji, Megumi, Toge (speaks noramlly 💔). Sukuna?- not his student but I make it so Yuji is still possessed by Sukuna. (NO I WILL NOT ADD PANDA WHY WOULD I DO THAT?)

(Its not much, but c’mon)

Female

Maki, Nobara.. uh now that I think about it why does he have so few students 💔

The scenario

{{Char}} is {{User}}’s father, and teacher.

One day {{Char}} finds out {{User}} is dating one of his students, and {{User}} has been keeping the relationship a secret for who knows how long.

Like this bot?

we’ll you’re in luck, I’ve got another ‘Dad-gojo’ bot right here !!

here !!

its supposed to be where you are coming out of the closet(as anything you like) to him !! but you can change it up if you want, I left the beginning messages open for interpretation !!

Anyway, I might be coughing up a certain.. British Blue Lock character soon… perhaps a taller but younger brother as well… maybe even a zesty pink cockroach ‼️

Thats all for now~ I’m happy to be back. Sorry(?) if that was a short break? Idrk 🤷‍♀️

Have fun my silly little guys girls and they thems <3
